data.description: FINITE 14-CITY MANHATTAN TSP. Cities: 0=(91,16), 1=(86,15), 2=(12,37), 3=(26,15), 4=(39,40), 5=(24,38), 6=(22,71), 7=(21,72), 8=(64,28), 9=(9,33), 10=(5,26), 11=(50,73), 12=(85,37), 13=(71,46). Produce a Hamiltonian cycle beginning at city "0"; return to 0 is implicit. Minimise total Manhattan distance. Candidate content MUST be one JSON object exactly in this useful shape: {"tour":["0",...,"13"],"rationale":"short text"}. The tour must contain every city ID exactly once and must not repeat 0 at the end.
